$comment: CodeAnt AI analysis configuration for Nexus-HEMS-Dash.
Role: AI CONTEXTUAL review layer (advisory). See DEVOPS.md + docs/runbooks/codeant-ai-integration.md.
De-duplication: analyzers already owned deterministically by the existing stack are DISABLED here so CodeAnt adds signal instead of noise:
- secrets  -> owned by Gitleaks (blocking) + DeepSource secrets analyzer
- sca      -> owned by pnpm audit + Grype/Trivy + Renovate
- iac      -> owned by Trivy (Helm) + DeepSource docker analyzer
- docstring-> owned by DeepSource doc-coverage (with skip_doc_coverage tuning)
CodeAnt KEEPS: sast (AI SAST complements CodeQL/Semgrep), deadcode, duplicatecode, antipatterns (architecture), complex_function.
Precedence: inline CI params > this repo config > dashboard UI settings.
